title: GraphQL queries should not be vulnerable to denial-of-service attacks
description: Unbounded recursion or unchecked variables can lead to a denial-of-service attack in GraphQL queries.
message: GraphQL query is vulnerable to a denial-of-service attack.
recommendation: Limit recursion depth or use a whitelist of safe variables.

noncompliant.code: query { allUsers { id name { allPosts { title } } } }

compliant.code: query { allUsers (limit: 10) { id name { posts { title } } } }

why_is_this_an_issue: Unbounded recursion or unchecked variables can cause a server to consume a large amount of resources, leading to a denial-of-service.
how_to_fix: Limit recursion depth or use a whitelist of safe variables.

logic.new_check_type_doc: RecursionDepthLimitCheck: Checks if a GraphQL query has a recursive selection with a depth greater than a given limit.

metadata.title: GraphQL queries should not be vulnerable to denial-of-service attacks
